title: MS: Molecular Ion Candidate
bodyText: A small but visible high-mass peak appears near the molecular ion. Which m/z value is the best molecular-ion candidate in this mock spectrum?

figures.description: Mock placeholder: normally this would show a mass spectrum with a strong fragment at m/z 43 and a weaker molecular ion near m/z 88.

feedbacks: m/z 31 is a low-mass fragment, not the molecular ion.
m/z 43 is the base peak, but the molecular ion should be the intact radical cation.
m/z 61 is a fragment peak in this spectrum.
Correct: the high-mass peak near m/z 88 is the best molecular-ion candidate.
